name: Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Indaptus Therapeutics is a clinical biotechnology company developing a novel and patented systemically-administered anti-cancer and anti-viral immunotherapy. Its lead product candidate, Decoy20, is an attenuated killed Gram-negative bacteria designed to activate innate and adaptive immunity. As of the date of the 10-K, the company has discontinued enrollment in its clinical trials and is pursuing a strategic transaction involving an investment in or acquisition of a target company.
sellsTo: Advanced solid tumor patients with no approved therapy options

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical biotechnology company that has developed a novel and patented systemically-administered anti-cancer and anti-viral immunotherapy.

catalysts.event: Plan to pursue a strategic transaction (investment in or acquisition of a target company)
catalysts.sentence: We plan to pursue a strategic transaction involving either an investment in or acquisition of a Target Company.
